name: Beef Stewed in Cranberry Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 1-1/2 pounds Stewing beef, trimmed of fat, cut into 1-inch cubes
1/8 teaspoon cayenne pepper, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4
Heat oil in a large skillet. Add beef and brown on all sides. Add onions and celery and sauté until golden brown. Add garlic and sauté mixture for 1 minute longer, stirring constantly. Do not let garlic change color. Stir water into the mixture, then add remaining ingredients. Cover and simmer for 1-1/4 hours, or until beef is tender and liquid reduces to 1/3 to 1/2 cup. If pan juice gets too low during cooking, add a little hot water. Or, if pan juice does not reduce sufficiently, uncover skillet during the last 30 minutes of cooking and stir often. Taste and correct seasonings. Stew goes well with brown rice. Makes 4 servings.
